# vector: hello_resp
# HELLO_RESP: versions, build_hash, firmware name, tick_hz, capabilities, project metadata, MCU model, and Scope resources
# raw  = frame before COBS (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, all LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 delimiter, the actual SCI-link octets
raw: 5a8100010054000a001100ebb6cc080a00000076696577657232303030000000000000204e0000ff0200007068617365342d64656d6f00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000d8356a020010000a000000f8df0000ba3c38b0
wire: 035a8102010254020a021106ebb6cc080a01010b76696577657232303030010101010103204e0103ff02010c7068617365342d64656d6f01010101010101010101010101010101010101010105d8356a020210020a010103f8df0105ba3c38b000
